categories.description: Owner command category for analysis, explanation, comparison, and discussion without making changes.
categories.executionRule: Do not change files, call live services, deploy, send messages, or change domains.

categories.description: Owner command category for planning work and defining implementation steps without changing files.
categories.executionRule: Produce plans only. Do not edit files or touch external systems.

categories.description: Owner command category for local source-controlled changes, offline validation, and pull-request preparation.
categories.executionRule: Keep changes local and source-controlled. Do not connect services, deploy, activate workflows, or send messages.

categories.description: Owner command category for staging deployment requests.
categories.executionRule: Do not deploy from foundation mode. Staging deployment execution requires explicit owner approval in a future scoped task.

categories.description: Owner command category for production deployment requests.
categories.executionRule: Do not deploy to production without explicit owner approval and a scoped deployment task.

categories.description: Owner command category for connecting external services, connectors, credentials, or integrations.
categories.executionRule: Document connection plans only unless the owner explicitly approves a specific connector or service task.

categories.description: Owner command category for domain, DNS, routing, or public URL changes.
categories.executionRule: Do not change domains, DNS, routing, or public URLs without explicit owner approval.

categories.description: Owner command category for sending external messages such as email, SMS, chat, or client-facing notifications.
categories.executionRule: Draft only. Do not send SMS, email, chat, or other external messages without explicit owner approval.

categories.description: Owner command category for stopping active automation, live workflows, or running operations.
categories.executionRule: Do not stop live systems from foundation mode. Stop actions require explicit owner approval and scoped target identification.

categories.description: Owner command category for reverting a change, restoring a previous state, or preparing rollback work.
categories.executionRule: Plan rollback work only unless the owner explicitly approves the target, method, and expected effect.

categories.description: Owner command category for offline review, safety checks, validation, and source-controlled inspection.
categories.executionRule: Run offline inspection and local validation only. Do not mutate live services or production data.
